prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HOOKSNPICKS-6PC Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Hook and Pick Precision Automotive Tool Set Puller Removers 6 Pieces Description: The ToolTreaux 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for pulling clips, wires, gaskets, and other small parts during automotive repair.

Each hook and pick features an ergonomic grip handle that is made of non-slip rubber that will help prevent slippage during use, assuring precision control and keeping your hands safe.

These hooks and picks are made of 40 HRC high carbon steel that won’t rust so you can count on them for years to come. The sturdy design will ensure that they will maintain their sharpness even after many uses.

Each hook and pick measures 9.25” in length, making them a great size for hard-to-reach spots. Although these are intended for automotive repair, they are also great tools for other precision work like jewelry making, and industrial and hobby craft use. Search Terms: hook and pick set pick and hooks automotive exterior accessories replacement tools auto tools supplies essentials replacements parts welding pullers removers extraction tools auto pullers removers hooks picks for auto repair body repair kits Features: - VERSATILE HOOK AND PICK SET - The ToolTreaux 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for pulling clips, wires, gaskets, and other small parts during automotive repair. - ERGONOMIC HANDLES - Each hook and pick features an ergonomic grip handle that is made of non-slip rubber that will help prevent slippage during use, assuring precision control and keeping your hands safe. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - These hooks and picks are made of 40 HRC high carbon steel that won’t rust so you can count on them for years to come. The sturdy design will ensure that they will maintain their sharpness even after many uses. - EXTENDED LENGTH FOR EASE OF USE - Each hook and pick measures 9.25” in length, making them a great size for hard-to-reach spots. Although these are intended for automotive repair, they are also great tools for other precision work like jewelry making, and industrial and hobby craft use. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: 40 HRC high carbon steel; Colors; red and black: Pack size: 6; Tools included: straight, hook, complex, 9 degree, combination and double angle; Length: 9.25”; Handle type: soft-grip ergonomic === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 6-Pc Hook and Pick Precision Automotive Tool Set

tokens.name: Hook and Pick Precision Automotive Tool Set

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 6-Piece Automotive Hook and Pick Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 6 Assorted Hooks And Picks, 40 HRC High Carbon Steel, Ergonomic Non-Slip Grip, Rust-Resistant, 925 In Length

openai.title_differentiation: 6 Piece Set, 6 Hook And Pick Types, Ergonomic Non Slip Grip, 40 HRC Steel, 925 Inch Reach, Rust Resistant
